old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-9n1p","title":"EDHOC: Double export_oscore call returns success with zeroed keys","description":"CORRECTNESS: After export_oscore succeeds, PRK material is wiped. A second call to export_oscore will:
1. Return success (0)
2. Derive OSCORE keys from zeroed PRK
3. Produce predictable/weak keys

Locations:
- edhoc_initiator_export_oscore: lines 766-769 wipe PRK after export
- edhoc_responder_export_oscore: lines 1178-1180 wipe PRK after export

The state remains EDHOC_STATE_COMPLETED after export, so the state check at lines 742/1156 passes on second call.

Impact: If application accidentally calls export twice, second OSCORE context has weak/predictable keys derived from zeros.

Fix: Transition to a new state (e.g., EDHOC_STATE_EXPORTED) after export and reject subsequent calls with -EALREADY or similar.

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:733-771,1148-1184","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:44:58.526322Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:44:58.526357Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-9n1p","title":"EDHOC: Double export_oscore call returns success with zeroed keys","description":"CORRECTNESS: After export_oscore succeeds, PRK material is wiped. A second call to export_oscore will:
1. Return success (0)
2. Derive OSCORE keys from zeroed PRK
3. Produce predictable/weak keys

Locations:
- edhoc_initiator_export_oscore: lines 766-769 wipe PRK after export
- edhoc_responder_export_oscore: lines 1178-1180 wipe PRK after export

The state remains EDHOC_STATE_COMPLETED after export, so the state check at lines 742/1156 passes on second call.

Impact: If application accidentally calls export twice, second OSCORE context has weak/predictable keys derived from zeros.

Fix: Transition to a new state (e.g., EDHOC_STATE_EXPORTED) after export and reject subsequent calls with -EALREADY or similar.

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:733-771,1148-1184","notes":"Commit: 7381a433f","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:44:58.526322Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:16:21.028290169Z"}

new_value: State transition to EXPORTED and -EBUSY on double export already implemented
